values: Diversity and inclusion as core engineering principle
Data driven decision making at scale
upsides: 150M+ active customers, massive scale ML problems
World class applied science team in Berlin
Competitive package with Berlin cost of living advantage
downsides: Work Council negotiations required for new AI tooling
Complex stakeholder matrix across tech and business
Hiring bar extremely high (bar raiser process inspired by Amazon)
idealTraits: Deep expertise in recommendation systems, personalization, or dynamic pricing
Track record of shipping ML models at scale (10M+ users)
Strong publication record or equivalent open source contributions
Collaborative mindset, ability to mentor and raise the bar

events.title: Pipeline initialized
events.detail: Processing sourcing request for Senior Applied Scientist, Berlin. Zalando, reports to Director of Talent Acquisition. Diversity target: 40% women

events.title: Multi channel sourcing activated
events.detail: Sourcing across 6 channels: LinkedIn, academic networks, adjacent industries, open source communities, women in tech networks, conference speakers. Target: 100 candidates, 40% women

events.title: Sourcing: LinkedIn
events.detail: Scanning linkedin for Senior Applied Scientist candidates matching Zalando requirements

events.title: Candidate sourced
events.detail: Prague, Czech Republic, 6 years, profile analyzed

events.title: Sourcing: Academic networks
events.detail: Scanning academic networks for Senior Applied Scientist candidates matching Zalando requirements

events.title: Candidate sourced
events.detail: Zurich, Switzerland, 6 years (4 PhD + 2 postdoc), profile analyzed

events.title: Candidate sourced

events.title: Candidate sourced

events.title: Candidate sourced

events.title: Candidate sourced
events.detail: Turin, Italy, 8 years (4 PhD + 4 research), profile analyzed

events.title: Candidate sourced
events.detail: Cambridge, UK, 6 years (4 PhD + 2 postdoc), profile analyzed

events.title: Sourcing: Adjacent industries
events.detail: Scanning adjacent industries for Senior Applied Scientist candidates matching Zalando requirements

events.title: Sourcing: Open source and Kaggle
events.detail: Scanning open source and kaggle for Senior Applied Scientist candidates matching Zalando requirements

events.title: Sourcing: Women in tech communities
events.detail: Scanning women in tech communities for Senior Applied Scientist candidates matching Zalando requirements

events.title: Sourcing: Conference speaker networks
events.detail: Scanning conference speaker networks for Senior Applied Scientist candidates matching Zalando requirements

events.title: Sourcing: LinkedIn standard
events.detail: Scanning LinkedIn for male and female candidates via standard keyword and skills matching

events.title: Candidate sourced
events.detail: Prague, Czech Republic, 7 years, profile analyzed

events.title: Candidate sourced
events.detail: Brno, Czech Republic, 3 years, profile analyzed

events.title: Candidate sourced
events.detail: Prague, Czech Republic, 7 years, profile analyzed

events.title: Skills first verification
events.detail: Cross referencing CVs against GitHub, Google Scholar, Kaggle, patent databases, and conference proceedings. No points for self promotion

events.title: Signal: Hidden leadership detected
events.detail: CV says 'contributed to personalization efforts' but GitHub shows she authored a recommendation library with 2.1k stars and led team of 6

events.title: Signal: Academic output exceeds CV claims
events.detail: CV mentions only 'research experience' but Google Scholar shows h-index 14, NeurIPS spotlight, and Kaggle top 1%. Previously filtered by Zalando's keyword matcher

events.title: Signal: Leadership understated
events.detail: CV says 'supported search ranking project' but Allegro internal references confirm she led the entire initiative for 20M users

events.title: Signal: Fairness ML expertise
events.detail: 3 of 9 publications directly address fairness aware recommendation. Directly relevant to Zalando's AI bias mitigation requirements

events.title: Signal: Open source impact hidden
events.detail: Maintains fashion embedding library (4.8k GitHub stars) used by major retailers. LinkedIn profile minimal, current role severely underleveled

events.title: Signal: Title mismatch detected
events.detail: LinkedIn says 'Data Analyst' but Kaggle gold medal in H&M Fashion Recommendations + 12 production quality ML repos on GitHub

events.title: Signal: Seniority understated
events.detail: CV describes as 'senior individual contributor' but actually Director of ML at Veepee leading team of 12. Salary expectation 15% below market

events.title: Signal: Academic credit gap
events.detail: CV says 'research assistant' for work where she was lead author on 5 papers. Consulted for ASOS on experimentation platform

events.title: Signal: Passive candidate identified
events.detail: WiMLDS organizer, Senior Applied Scientist at Spotify. Built discovery algorithm for 200M+ users. Not actively looking but open to Zalando's mission

events.title: Signal: Bias detection expertise
events.detail: Author of open source bias detection toolkit (3.2k GitHub stars). Directly relevant to Zalando's AI fairness requirements

events.title: Signal: Restricted LinkedIn profile
events.detail: RecSys 2024 keynote speaker on fairness in fashion recommendation. Staff at Amazon, 12 publications, h-index 19. Invisible to standard LinkedIn recruiter search

events.title: Signal: Cultural alignment detected
events.detail: NeurIPS workshop on causal inference for business. Built A/B testing framework used by 500+ engineers at Spotify. Passionate about fair ML

events.title: Signal: Hybrid role detected
events.detail: CV lists 'manager' but still codes 40% of the time. Head of Data Science at About You, built recommendation engine from scratch. Direct competitor knowledge

events.title: Signal: Cross domain transferability
events.detail: Patent holder on sequential decision models at Klarna. Fraud detection to pricing optimization is a proven transfer path

events.title: Signal: Impact understated
events.detail: CV does not mention that her pricing research at Deliveroo drove 3% revenue uplift. 3 papers on dynamic pricing under uncertainty

events.title: Signal: CV inflation detected
events.detail: LinkedIn claims 'AI Visionary, Thought Leader'. Verification: standard data pipeline engineering. No publications, no open source, no verifiable ML output

events.title: Signal: Role inflation detected
events.detail: CV claims 'led ML transformation'. Verification: managed PowerBI dashboards, no ML models in production

events.title: Signal: Experience mismatch
events.detail: CV: 'Senior AI Strategist' at Big 4. Verification: advisory work only, no hands on model building. Medium articles listed as 'publications'

events.title: Signal: Output gap detected
events.detail: LinkedIn: 15k followers, 'Top Voice in AI'. Actual output: 2 Jupyter notebooks, last commit 18 months ago. Current role: product manager

events.title: Signal: Claim unverified
events.detail: CV claims 'built recommendation engine from scratch'. Verification: integrated third party API, no custom ML development

events.title: Signal: Title seniority mismatch
events.detail: VP of AI title at mid size retailer. Team of 3, mostly BI dashboards. Skills assessment reveals significant gaps in modern ML

events.title: Signal: Bootcamp inflation
events.detail: Bootcamp graduate positioning as 'Full Stack ML Engineer'. GitHub: forked repos only. Salary expectation at senior level despite junior output

events.title: Signal: Referral bias flag
events.detail: Strong networking: 5 referrals from Zalando employees. But GitHub shows tutorial completions presented as projects. No deployed models

events.title: 17 candidates below minimum qualification bar
events.detail: Insufficient ML experience, no verifiable research or production output, or mismatched role expectations

events.title: 12 candidates: high self presentation, low verified skills
events.detail: CV claims could not be verified against GitHub, publications, or technical assessments. Traditional screening would have advanced these candidates

events.title: Personalized outreach
events.detail: Contacting top 30 candidates with role specific messaging. Emphasizing Zalando's scale, publication culture, and diversity commitment

events.title: Outreach message sent
events.detail: Personalized message highlighting role scope, team culture, and growth opportunity at Zalando

events.title: Response analysis
events.detail: Analyzing candidate responses for engagement quality, technical curiosity, and cultural alignment signals

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 8 min. Asked about team size, publication support, and fairness research agenda. Mentioned wanting to leave Amazon for European work life balance

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 12 min. Shared additional unpublished research on fashion recommendation. Expressed excitement about Zalando's scale

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 20 min. Asked detailed questions about recommendation infrastructure and A/B testing framework

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 5 min. Very interested but flagged potential non compete clause with About You. Needs legal review

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 30 min. Interested but mentioned preference for management track. May not want IC role

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 15 min. Immediately connected her fairness research to Zalando's specific challenges. Deep domain understanding

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 45 min. Professional interest but mentioned loyalty to Booking.com team. Would need strong pull factor

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 10 min. Shared her fashion embedding library directly. Asked about scale of Zalando's recommendation traffic

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 18 min. Mentioned her NeurIPS workshop and asked about Zalando's experimentation culture. Strong alignment

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 25 min. Standard professional interest. Currently on Amazon internal transfer freeze, timing works

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 35 min. Interested in applied science challenge. Klarna experience directly relevant to pricing models

events.title: No response
events.detail: No response after 48 hours. H&M likely has strong retention package. Flagged as passive

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 22 min. Very excited about Zalando opportunity. Mentioned Veepee is too small for her ambitions now

events.title: Reply analyzed for engagement pattern
events.detail: Replied in 40 min. Not actively looking but agreed to exploratory conversation. Spotify is comfortable but wants bigger impact

events.title: Technical deep dive interviews
events.detail: Conducting structured interviews with top 8 candidates. Same rubric for all: research depth, production experience, collaboration, fairness awareness

events.title: Interview evidence integrated
events.detail: Exceptional depth in fairness aware recommendation. Described building bias monitoring pipeline at Amazon scale. Clear vision for how to apply at Zalando. Mentorship examples strong

events.title: Interview evidence integrated
events.detail: Outstanding research depth. RecSys challenge solution directly applicable. Showed production awareness despite academic background. Zalando scale excites her

events.title: Interview evidence integrated
events.detail: Strong systems thinker. Delivery Hero personalization architecture deep dive was impressive. Collaborative style evident. Undervalued in current role

events.title: Interview evidence integrated
events.detail: Fairness ML expertise is world class. Research directly applicable. Slightly less production experience but strong mentorship potential

events.title: Interview evidence integrated
events.detail: Technical depth extraordinary. Fashion embedding library demo was compelling. Communication style understated but substance is exceptional

events.title: Interview evidence integrated
events.detail: Very strong candidate. Deep pricing expertise. But non compete concern is real, estimated 6 month wait. Recommended for pipeline, not immediate hire

events.title: Interview evidence integrated
events.detail: Excellent technical interview. Booking.com ranking experience is premium. However, indicated he'd need significant comp increase to move

events.title: Interview evidence integrated
events.detail: Strong experimentation focus. A/B testing framework at Spotify is impressive. Good cultural fit. Slightly less depth in recommendation systems specifically

events.title: Final shortlist
events.detail: Selecting top 5 candidates based on holistic multi signal analysis. Slate composition: 3 women, 2 men

events.title: Shortlisted #1
events.detail: Fairness in fashion recommendation expert. RecSys keynote speaker. Invisible to LinkedIn sourcing. Wants to leave Amazon for European opportunity

events.title: Shortlisted #2
events.detail: ETH Zurich, NeurIPS spotlight. Previously filtered by Zalando's own keyword matcher. Kaggle top 1%. Academic to industry transition ready

events.title: Shortlisted #3
events.detail: Delivery Hero personalization lead. CV massively understated her role. GitHub proves technical depth. Berlin based, immediate availability

events.title: Shortlisted #4
events.detail: Max Planck fairness ML researcher. 3 papers directly addressing Zalando's bias challenges. Strong mentorship profile

events.title: Shortlisted #5
events.detail: About You dynamic pricing expert. Strong match but 6 month non compete delay. Pipeline candidate for Q3

events.title: Pipeline complete
events.detail: 100 candidates sourced across 6 channels. 40% women achieved (vs 20% market baseline). Top 5 shortlist: 4 women, 1 man. 3 of 4 women would have been invisible to traditional LinkedIn only sourcing

reveal.hiredOutcome: Strong hire but delayed 6 months due to non compete. Eventually joined and performing well in dynamic pricing. However, the 6 month delay cost Zalando an estimated 2 quarters of recommendation improvements
reveal.tenerOutcome: Would have started immediately. RecSys keynote speaker with 12 publications on fairness aware recommendation. Directly addresses Zalando's #1 concern (AI bias). Was invisible to LinkedIn recruiters due to restricted profile. Sourced via conference speaker network
